overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the 'Farm of Elais' at night. The character walks along a coastal dirt path, enters a rural farmstead through a wooden gate, explores the torchlit courtyard with thatched buildings and campfires, and finally enters a stone farmhouse. The scene features Mediterranean vegetation, ancient Greek architecture, and a mix of moonlight and firelight illumination.

goat runs across the path from left to right in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the farm entrance, with the sea visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal dirt trail at night, approaching the Farm of Elais. Tall cypress trees line the path while the moonlit Mediterranean sea and a distant illuminated city are visible to the left. A goat briefly crosses the path, and a discovery notification appears as the wooden farm gate comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm entrance courtyard with gate and outbuildings

events.description: character passes through the wooden farm gate into the enclosed courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the wooden gate and entering the farm courtyard, observing the layout

notable_agents.action: farm worker standing near the gate structure observing the area

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with carved markings
rustic building with straw thatched roof and wooden supports
active campfire with flames illuminating the ground
wooden farm cart with large wheels parked near the fence

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the wooden farm gate into the torchlit courtyard of the Farm of Elais. A stone monument tower stands to the right while a thatched farmhouse lies ahead. The area is sparsely populated with a few NPCs standing near the structures, and campfires provide warm light against the cool night.

scene_state.functional_zone: farm workshop area with storage and cooking fires

agents.ego_description: wandering through the farm courtyard examining the various structures and equipment

notable_agents.action: armed guard patrolling near the tent structure

entered.detail: temporary shelter with canvas and thatch roofing supported by wooden poles
wooden tripod structure with hanging pot over a fire
large clay storage jars stacked near the wall
wooden framework structure for construction or storage

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open farm courtyard, passing by a cooking tripod with a burning fire and large pottery amphorae. A thatched tent canopy provides shelter on the right, while the stone monument now appears on the left. The area contains various farming implements and wooden structures scattered across the gravel ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: main farmhouse entrance and interior corridor

events.description: character enters the main farmhouse building through the doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching the main farmhouse, ascending the stone steps, and entering the torchlit interior

notable_agents.action: armed guard holding a torch standing in the interior corridor

entered.detail: large stone farmhouse with red wooden door and striped masonry walls
rustic wooden fence lining the stone path
burning torch mounted on the wall illuminating the doorway
narrow stone-walled hallway with wooden ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main farmhouse building, passing wooden fences and ascending stone steps to the entrance. A burning torch sconce lights the doorway as the character enters the narrow stone corridor inside. An armed NPC holding a torch stands in the interior hallway ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit coastal trail into the torchlit interior of a rural Greek farmstead. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path lined with cypress trees, with the Mediterranean sea and a distant glowing city visible to the left before a goat crosses the path toward a wooden gate. As the character passes through the gate, the cool moonlight shifts to the warm glow of campfires and torches within a courtyard featuring a stone monument tower and thatched buildings. The scene then expands across the gravel grounds, passing by burning cooking tripods and pottery amphorae under a tent canopy before turning toward the main farmhouse. Finally, the camera ascends stone steps and passes a burning torch sconce to enter a narrow stone corridor where an armed guard stands waiting.
